description: Local multi-cloud simulator (AWS/GCP/Azure) with real backends — full SDK + CLI parity for boto3, aws-cli, google-cloud-*, azure-sdk-*, Terraform.
post_install: Write-Host '==> Vyomi installed. Run `vyomi up` to start the simulator.' -ForegroundColor Green

script: Write-Host '==> Stopping appliance VM (if running)...' -ForegroundColor Yellow

notes: CloudLearn ships as an appliance — the launcher runs a single Multipass VM and starts the full simulator stack (FastAPI + 8 real backends + Java CloudSim) inside.
Prerequisites (Scoop's `depends` handles multipass; you also need):
- ~32 GB free disk for VM image + container layers
cloud-learn up               # boots VM + simulator (5-10 min first run)
Start http://192.168.x.x:9000   # URL printed in the launcher banner
